failures.description: The agent fabricated an unsupported cheapest item and price instead of answering from the catalog search result.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user's goal was to identify the cheapest available Smartphone using ProductCatalogSearch evidence. The tool output at index 3 clearly returned two available smartphones sorted by ascending price: item 5339029584 at $1128.99 and item 1507389580 at $1157.86. At index 4, the Executor introduced item 0000000000 priced at $0.01, which is absent from all prior evidence and contradicts the tool result. This fabricated value was used as the final answer. The later Evaluator repeated and approved the same fabricated claim, so the failure was not resolved.
